shelfmark_ssi: UTO Sinai Greek NF M 48, SPP No. 209
contents_tesim: The text presents many variations and different arrangements compared to the editions
full_text_tesim: Informal minuscule, upright or sloping to the right, with numerous abbreviations. The liturgical rubrics are written in a small “Alexandrinische Auszeichnungs-Majuskel”
The text presents many variations and different arrangements compared to the editions
